name: Deco Tentacle

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C0905B2A-25EB-11EE-AC75-525400685065

comment:
Deco Tentacle is an an innovative lighting solution that combines vibrant color mixing, cuttable customizations, and excellent durability. The DECO Tentacle is designed to deliver bright and vibrant lighting effects. Equipped with 210 .45W RGBWW Tetra Color Mixing LEDs, it offers a wide range of colors and shades to create the perfect ambiance for any space.

The DECO Tentacle stands out with its unique cuttable feature. Each segment of the tentacle can be precisely cut at a length of either 6.5 inches or 166 mm, this allows for easy customization and adaptation to various requirements. Whether you need a long continuous strip or shorter segments, the DECO Tentacle provides the flexibility to fit your specific lighting needs.

This unit takes lighting precision to the next level with individually lensed LEDs, ensuring precise and focused illumination. Each LED is equipped with its own lens, designed to provide a 31° field angle to result in a concentrated and defined lighting effect.

Durability is a top priority for the DECO Tentacle. Featuring an IP65 rating, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor installations. This high rating ensures that the tentacle is resistant to dust, water, and other environmental factors, providing reliable performance even in challenging conditions. You can confidently deploy the DECO Tentacle in dry indoor spaces or outdoor locations exposed to rain or water sprays.

The DECO Tentacle is a cutting-edge lighting solution that combines vibrant color mixing, cuttable customizations, and excellent durability. Simplify your next installation with the DECO Tentacle and create an atmosphere that matches your unique style and preferences.
